585 Cqd8_d0_LNP = value;
586 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_0d_LNP") == 0) {
587 Cqd8_0d_LNP = value;
588 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_ud_LNP") == 0) {
589 Cqd8_ud_LNP = value;
590 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_dd_LNP") == 0) {
591 Cqd8_dd_LNP = value;
592 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_y_LNP") == 0) {
593 Cqd8_y_LNP = value;
594 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_uy_LNP") == 0) {
595 Cqd8_uy_LNP = value;
596 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_dy_LNP") == 0) {
597 Cqd8_dy_LNP = value;
598 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_yu_LNP") == 0) {
599 Cqd8_yu_LNP = value;
600 } else if (name.compare("Cqd8_yd_LNP") == 0) {
601 Cqd8_yd_LNP = value;
602 } else if (name.compare("Cledq_00_LNP") == 0) {
603 Cledq_00_LNP = value;
604 } else if (name.compare("Clequ1_00_LNP") == 0) {
605 Clequ1_00_LNP = value;
606 } else if (name.compare("Clequ3_00_LNP") == 0) {
607 Clequ3_00_LNP = value;
608 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1_00_LNP") == 0) {
609 Cquqd1_00_LNP = value;
610 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1_u0_LNP") == 0) {
611 Cquqd1_u0_LNP = value;
612 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1_d0_LNP") == 0) {
613 Cquqd1_d0_LNP = value;
614 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1_0u_LNP") == 0) {
615 Cquqd1_0u_LNP = value;
616 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1_0d_LNP") == 0) {
617 Cquqd1_0d_LNP = value;
618 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1p_00_LNP") == 0) {
619 Cquqd1p_00_LNP = value;
620 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1p_u0_LNP") == 0) {
621 Cquqd1p_u0_LNP = value;
622 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1p_d0_LNP") == 0) {
623 Cquqd1p_d0_LNP = value;
624 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1p_0u_LNP") == 0) {
625 Cquqd1p_0u_LNP = value;
626 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd1p_0d_LNP") == 0) {
627 Cquqd1p_0d_LNP = value;
628 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8_00_LNP") == 0) {
629 Cquqd8_00_LNP = value;
630 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8_u0_LNP") == 0) {
631 Cquqd8_u0_LNP = value;
632 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8_d0_LNP") == 0) {
633 Cquqd8_d0_LNP = value;
634 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8_0u_LNP") == 0) {
635 Cquqd8_0u_LNP = value;
636 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8_0d_LNP") == 0) {
637 Cquqd8_0d_LNP = value;
638 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8p_00_LNP") == 0) {
639 Cquqd8p_00_LNP = value;
640 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8p_u0_LNP") == 0) {
641 Cquqd8p_u0_LNP = value;
642 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8p_d0_LNP") == 0) {
643 Cquqd8p_d0_LNP = value;
644 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8p_0u_LNP") == 0) {
645 Cquqd8p_0u_LNP = value;
646 } else if (name.compare("Cquqd8p_0d_LNP") == 0) {
647 Cquqd8p_0d_LNP = value;
648 } else if (name.compare("Lambda_NP") == 0) {
649 Lambda_NP = value;
650 } else {
651 NPSMEFTd6General::setParameter(name, value);
652 }
653}
654
655void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setNPSMEFTd6GeneralParameters() {
656
657 // Build Yukawa matrix bundle (constructor initialises all to zero)
658 YukawaMats Y;
659
660 // Leptons (flavor diagonal)
661 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
662 double yl = getSMEFTCoeffEW("YeR", i, i);
663 Y.YlL.assign(i, yl);
664 Y.Yl2L.assign(i, yl*yl);
665 }
666
667 // Quark Sector - Single Yukawa
668 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
669 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
670 Y.YuL.assignre(i, j, getSMEFTCoeffEW("YuR", i, j));
671 Y.YuL.assignim(i, j, getSMEFTCoeffEW("YuI", i, j));
672 }
673 }
674
675 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
676 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
677 Y.YdL.assignre(i, j, getSMEFTCoeffEW("YdR", i, j));
678 Y.YdL.assignim(i, j, getSMEFTCoeffEW("YdI", i, j));
679 }
680 }
681
682 Y.YucL = Y.YuL.hconjugate();
683 Y.YdcL = Y.YdL.hconjugate();
684
685 // Products of two Yukawas
686 Y.SQUL = Y.YucL * Y.YuL;
687 Y.SQDL = Y.YdcL * Y.YdL;
688 Y.SUL = Y.YuL * Y.YucL;
689 Y.SDL = Y.YdL * Y.YdcL;
690 Y.SUDL = Y.YuL * Y.YdcL;
691 Y.SUDcL = Y.YdL * Y.YucL;
692
693 // Products of three Yukawas
694 Y.SQUYucL = Y.SQUL * Y.YucL;
695 Y.YuSQUL = Y.YuL * Y.SQUL;
696 Y.SQUYdcL = Y.SQUL * Y.YdcL;
697 Y.YdSQUL = Y.YdL * Y.SQUL;
698 Y.SQDYucL = Y.SQDL * Y.YucL;
699 Y.YuSQDL = Y.YuL * Y.SQDL;
700 Y.SQDYdcL = Y.SQDL * Y.YdcL;
701 Y.YdSQDL = Y.YdL * Y.SQDL;
702
703 setParams_dipoleYukawa(Y);
704 setParams_downLeptonDipole(Y);
705 setParams_HiggsCurrentSemileptonic(Y);
706 setParams_4quarkQQ(Y);
707 setParams_4quarkUD8_QuU(Y);
708 setParams_4quarkQD(Y);
709 setParams_semileptonic4f(Y);
710 setParams_Cquqd(Y);
711}
712
713
714// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
715// Helper: setParams_dipoleYukawa
716// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
717void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_dipoleYukawa(const YukawaMats& Y) {
718 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
719 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
720 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
721 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
722 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;
723 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdcL = Y.YdcL;
724 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUL = Y.SQUL;
725 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDL = Y.SQDL;
726 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUL = Y.SUL;
727 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SDL = Y.SDL;
728 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDL = Y.SUDL;
729 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDcL = Y.SUDcL;
730 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYucL = Y.SQUYucL;
731 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQUL = Y.YuSQUL;
732 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYdcL = Y.SQUYdcL;
733 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQUL = Y.YdSQUL;
734 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYucL = Y.SQDYucL;
735 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQDL = Y.YuSQDL;
736 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYdcL = Y.SQDYdcL;
737 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQDL = Y.YdSQDL;
738 (void)YlL; (void)Yl2L; (void)YuL; (void)YucL; (void)YdL; (void)YdcL;
739 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
740 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
741 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
742
743 CuH_11r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).real();
744 CuH_11i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).imag();
745 CuH_12r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).real();
746 CuH_12i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).imag();
747 CuH_13r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).real();
748 CuH_13i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).imag();
749 CuH_21r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).real();
750 CuH_21i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).imag();
751 CuH_22r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).real();
752 CuH_22i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).imag();
753 CuH_23r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).real();
754 CuH_23i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).imag();
755 CuH_31r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).real();
756 CuH_31i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).imag();
757 CuH_32r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).real();
758 CuH_32i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).imag();
759 CuH_33r_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).real();
760 CuH_33i_LNP = (CuH_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuH_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuH_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).imag();
761
762 CuG_11r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).real();
763 CuG_11i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).imag();
764 CuG_12r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).real();
765 CuG_12i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).imag();
766 CuG_13r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).real();
767 CuG_13i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).imag();
768 CuG_21r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).real();
769 CuG_21i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).imag();
770 CuG_22r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).real();
771 CuG_22i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).imag();
772 CuG_23r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).real();
773 CuG_23i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).imag();
774 CuG_31r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).real();
775 CuG_31i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).imag();
776 CuG_32r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).real();
777 CuG_32i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).imag();
778 CuG_33r_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).real();
779 CuG_33i_LNP = (CuG_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuG_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuG_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).imag();
780
781 CuW_11r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).real();
782 CuW_11i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).imag();
783 CuW_12r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).real();
784 CuW_12i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).imag();
785 CuW_13r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).real();
786 CuW_13i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).imag();
787 CuW_21r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).real();
788 CuW_21i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).imag();
789 CuW_22r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).real();
790 CuW_22i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).imag();
791 CuW_23r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).real();
792 CuW_23i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).imag();
793 CuW_31r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).real();
794 CuW_31i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).imag();
795 CuW_32r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).real();
796 CuW_32i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).imag();
797 CuW_33r_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).real();
798 CuW_33i_LNP = (CuW_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuW_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuW_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).imag();
799
800 CuB_11r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).real();
801 CuB_11i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(0,0)).imag();
802 CuB_12r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).real();
803 CuB_12i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(0,1)).imag();
804 CuB_13r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).real();
805 CuB_13i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(0,2)).imag();
806 CuB_21r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).real();
807 CuB_21i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,0) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,0) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(1,0)).imag();
808 CuB_22r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).real();
809 CuB_22i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,1) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,1) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(1,1)).imag();
810 CuB_23r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).real();
811 CuB_23i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(1,2) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(1,2) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(1,2)).imag();
812 CuB_31r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).real();
813 CuB_31i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,0) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,0) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(2,0)).imag();
814 CuB_32r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).real();
815 CuB_32i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,1) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,1) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(2,1)).imag();
816 CuB_33r_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).real();
817 CuB_33i_LNP = (CuB_d_LNP*SQDYucL(2,2) + CuB_u_LNP*SQUYucL(2,2) + CuB_0_LNP*YucL(2,2)).imag();
818
819}
820
821// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
822// Helper: setParams_downLeptonDipole
823// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
824void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_downLeptonDipole(const YukawaMats& Y) {
825 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
826 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
827 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
828 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
829 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;

846 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
847 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
848 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
849
850 CdH_11r_LNP = (CdH_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0) + CdH_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0) + CdH_0_LNP*YdcL(0,0)).real();
851 CdH_11i_LNP = (CdH_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0) + CdH_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0) + CdH_0_LNP*YdcL(0,0)).imag();

856 CdH_21r_LNP = (CdH_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0) + CdH_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0) + CdH_0_LNP*YdcL(1,0)).real();

915 CdB_22r_LNP = (CdB_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,1) + CdB_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,1) + CdB_0_LNP*YdcL(1,1)).real();
916 CdB_22i_LNP = (CdB_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,1) + CdB_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,1) + CdB_0_LNP*YdcL(1,1)).imag();
917 CdB_23r_LNP = (CdB_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2) + CdB_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,2) + CdB_0_LNP*YdcL(1,2)).real();
918 CdB_23i_LNP = (CdB_d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2) + CdB_u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,2) + CdB_0_LNP*YdcL(1,2)).imag();

925
926 CeH_11r_LNP = (CeH_0_LNP*YlL(0)).real();
927 CeH_22r_LNP = (CeH_0_LNP*YlL(1)).real();
928 CeH_33r_LNP = (CeH_0_LNP*YlL(2)).real();
929
930 CeW_11r_LNP = (CeW_0_LNP*YlL(0)).real();

935 CeB_22r_LNP = (CeB_0_LNP*YlL(1)).real();
936 CeB_33r_LNP = (CeB_0_LNP*YlL(2)).real();
937

939
940// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
941// Helper: setParams_HiggsCurrentSemileptonic
942// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
943void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_HiggsCurrentSemileptonic(const YukawaMats& Y) {
944 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
945 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
946 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
947 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
948 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;
949 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdcL = Y.YdcL;
950 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUL = Y.SQUL;
951 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDL = Y.SQDL;
952 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUL = Y.SUL;
953 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SDL = Y.SDL;
954 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDL = Y.SUDL;
955 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDcL = Y.SUDcL;
956 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYucL = Y.SQUYucL;
957 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQUL = Y.YuSQUL;
958 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYdcL = Y.SQUYdcL;
959 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQUL = Y.YdSQUL;
960 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYucL = Y.SQDYucL;
961 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQDL = Y.YuSQDL;
962 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYdcL = Y.SQDYdcL;
963 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQDL = Y.YdSQDL;
964 (void)YlL; (void)Yl2L; (void)YuL; (void)YucL; (void)YdL; (void)YdcL;
965 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
966 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
967 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
968
969 CHq1_11r_LNP = (CHq1_0_LNP + CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(0,0)).real();
970 CHq1_12r_LNP = (CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(0,1)).real();
971 CHq1_12i_LNP = (CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(0,1)).imag();
972 CHq1_13r_LNP = (CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(0,2)).real();
973 CHq1_13i_LNP = (CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(0,2)).imag();
974 CHq1_22r_LNP = (CHq1_0_LNP + CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(1,1) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(1,1)).real();
975 CHq1_23r_LNP = (CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(1,2)).real();
976 CHq1_23i_LNP = (CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(1,2)).imag();
977 CHq1_33r_LNP = (CHq1_0_LNP + CHq1_d_LNP*SQDL(2,2) + CHq1_u_LNP*SQUL(2,2)).real();
978
979 CHq3_11r_LNP = (CHq3_0_LNP + CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(0,0)).real();
980 CHq3_12r_LNP = (CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(0,1)).real();
981 CHq3_12i_LNP = (CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(0,1)).imag();
982 CHq3_13r_LNP = (CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(0,2)).real();
983 CHq3_13i_LNP = (CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(0,2)).imag();
984 CHq3_22r_LNP = (CHq3_0_LNP + CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(1,1) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(1,1)).real();
985 CHq3_23r_LNP = (CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(1,2)).real();
986 CHq3_23i_LNP = (CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(1,2)).imag();
987 CHq3_33r_LNP = (CHq3_0_LNP + CHq3_d_LNP*SQDL(2,2) + CHq3_u_LNP*SQUL(2,2)).real();
988
989 CHu_11r_LNP = (CHu_0_LNP + CHu_u_LNP*SUL(0,0)).real();
990 CHu_12r_LNP = (CHu_u_LNP*SUL(0,1)).real();
991 CHu_12i_LNP = (CHu_u_LNP*SUL(0,1)).imag();
992 CHu_13r_LNP = (CHu_u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).real();
993 CHu_13i_LNP = (CHu_u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).imag();
994 CHu_22r_LNP = (CHu_0_LNP + CHu_u_LNP*SUL(1,1)).real();
995 CHu_23r_LNP = (CHu_u_LNP*SUL(1,2)).real();
996 CHu_23i_LNP = (CHu_u_LNP*SUL(1,2)).imag();
997 CHu_33r_LNP = (CHu_0_LNP + CHu_u_LNP*SUL(2,2)).real();
998
999 CHd_11r_LNP = (CHd_0_LNP + CHd_d_LNP*SDL(0,0)).real();
1000 CHd_12r_LNP = (CHd_d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).real();
1001 CHd_12i_LNP = (CHd_d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).imag();
1002 CHd_13r_LNP = (CHd_d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).real();
1003 CHd_13i_LNP = (CHd_d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).imag();
1004 CHd_22r_LNP = (CHd_0_LNP + CHd_d_LNP*SDL(1,1)).real();
1005 CHd_23r_LNP = (CHd_d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).real();
1006 CHd_23i_LNP = (CHd_d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).imag();
1007 CHd_33r_LNP = (CHd_0_LNP + CHd_d_LNP*SDL(2,2)).real();

1171 Clu_2222r_LNP = (Clu_00_LNP + Clu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,1) + Clu_l0_LNP*Yl2L(1)).real();

1179 Clu_3313i_LNP = (Clu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).imag();

1183 Clu_3333r_LNP = (Clu_00_LNP + Clu_0u_LNP*SUL(2,2) + Clu_l0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();
1184
1185 Cld_1111r_LNP = (Cld_00_LNP + Cld_0d_LNP*SDL(0,0) + Cld_l0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();

1187 Cld_1112i_LNP = (Cld_0d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).imag();

1192 Cld_1123i_LNP = (Cld_0d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).imag();

1198 Cld_2213i_LNP = (Cld_0d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).imag();

1203 Cld_3311r_LNP = (Cld_00_LNP + Cld_0d_LNP*SDL(0,0) + Cld_l0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();

1211 Cld_3333r_LNP = (Cld_00_LNP + Cld_0d_LNP*SDL(2,2) + Cld_l0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();

1213 Ceu_1111r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,0) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();

1215 Ceu_1112i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,1)).imag();
1216 Ceu_1113r_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).real();
1217 Ceu_1113i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).imag();
1218 Ceu_1122r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,1) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();
1219 Ceu_1123r_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,2)).real();
1220 Ceu_1123i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,2)).imag();
1221 Ceu_1133r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(2,2) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();
1222 Ceu_2211r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,0) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(1)).real();

1224 Ceu_2212i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,1)).imag();
1225 Ceu_2213r_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).real();
1226 Ceu_2213i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).imag();
1227 Ceu_2222r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,1) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(1)).real();

1230 Ceu_2233r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(2,2) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(1)).real();

1233 Ceu_3312i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,1)).imag();
1234 Ceu_3313r_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).real();
1235 Ceu_3313i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(0,2)).imag();
1236 Ceu_3322r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,1) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();
1237 Ceu_3323r_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,2)).real();
1238 Ceu_3323i_LNP = (Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(1,2)).imag();
1239 Ceu_3333r_LNP = (Ceu_00_LNP + Ceu_0u_LNP*SUL(2,2) + Ceu_e0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();
1240
1241 Ced_1111r_LNP = (Ced_00_LNP + Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,0) + Ced_e0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();
1242 Ced_1112r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).real();
1243 Ced_1112i_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).imag();
1244 Ced_1113r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).real();
1245 Ced_1113i_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).imag();
1246 Ced_1122r_LNP = (Ced_00_LNP + Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(1,1) + Ced_e0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();
1247 Ced_1123r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).real();
1248 Ced_1123i_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).imag();
1249 Ced_1133r_LNP = (Ced_00_LNP + Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(2,2) + Ced_e0_LNP*Yl2L(0)).real();

1251 Ced_2212r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).real();
1252 Ced_2212i_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,1)).imag();
1253 Ced_2213r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).real();
1254 Ced_2213i_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).imag();

1257 Ced_2223i_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).imag();
1258 Ced_2233r_LNP = (Ced_00_LNP + Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(2,2) + Ced_e0_LNP*Yl2L(1)).real();
1259 Ced_3311r_LNP = (Ced_00_LNP + Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,0) + Ced_e0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();

1262 Ced_3313r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(0,2)).real();

1265 Ced_3323r_LNP = (Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(1,2)).real();

1267 Ced_3333r_LNP = (Ced_00_LNP + Ced_0d_LNP*SDL(2,2) + Ced_e0_LNP*Yl2L(2)).real();
1268
1269}
1270
1271// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1272// Helper: setParams_4quarkQQ
1273// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1274void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_4quarkQQ(const YukawaMats& Y) {
1275 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
1276 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
1277 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
1278 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
1279 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;
1280 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdcL = Y.YdcL;
1281 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUL = Y.SQUL;
1282 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDL = Y.SQDL;
1283 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUL = Y.SUL;
1284 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SDL = Y.SDL;
1285 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDL = Y.SUDL;
1286 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDcL = Y.SUDcL;
1287 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYucL = Y.SQUYucL;
1288 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQUL = Y.YuSQUL;
1289 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYdcL = Y.SQUYdcL;
1290 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQUL = Y.YdSQUL;
1291 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYucL = Y.SQDYucL;
1292 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQDL = Y.YuSQDL;
1293 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYdcL = Y.SQDYdcL;
1294 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQDL = Y.YdSQDL;
1295 (void)YlL; (void)Yl2L; (void)YuL; (void)YucL; (void)YdL; (void)YdcL;
1296 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
1297 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
1298 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
1299
1300 Cqq1_1111r_LNP = (Cqq1_00_LNP + 2*Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,0) + 2*Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,0) + 2*Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1p_00_LNP + 2*Cqq1p_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,0) + 2*Cqq1p_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,0) + 2*Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,0)).real();
1301 Cqq1_1112r_LNP = (Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1p_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1)).real();
1302 Cqq1_1112i_LNP = (Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,1) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1p_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,1)).imag();
1303 Cqq1_1113r_LNP = (Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1p_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2)).real();
1304 Cqq1_1113i_LNP = (Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1p_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(0,2)).imag();
1305 Cqq1_1122r_LNP = (Cqq1_00_LNP + Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(1,1) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(1,1) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(1,1)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(1,1) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(1,1) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(1,1) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQDL(1,0) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(1,0)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(1,0) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,1)*SQUL(1,0)).real();
1306 Cqq1_1123r_LNP = (Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(1,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(1,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQDL(1,0) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(1,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(1,0) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,2)*SQUL(1,0)).real();
1307 Cqq1_1123i_LNP = (Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(1,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(1,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQDL(1,0) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(1,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(1,0) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,2)*SQUL(1,0)).imag();
1308 Cqq1_1133r_LNP = (Cqq1_00_LNP + Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + Cqq1_d0_LNP*SQDL(2,2) + Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQDL(2,2) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(2,2)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqq1_u0_LNP*SQUL(2,2) + Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,0)*SQUL(2,2) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,0)*SQUL(2,2) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQDL(2,0) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(2,0)*SQUL(0,2) + Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,2)*SQUL(2,0) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,2)*SQUL(2,0)).real();
1309 Cqq1_1212r_LNP = (Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQDL(0,1) + 2*Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQDL(0,1) + 2*Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1)).real();
1310 Cqq1_1212i_LNP = (Cqq1_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQDL(0,1) + 2*Cqq1_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_dd_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQDL(0,1) + 2*Cqq1p_ud_LNP*SQDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1) + Cqq1p_uu_LNP*SQUL(0,1)*SQUL(0,1)).imag();

1845// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1846// Helper: setParams_4quarkQD
1847// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1848void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_4quarkQD(const YukawaMats& Y) {
1849 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
1850 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
1851 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
1852 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
1853 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;
1854 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdcL = Y.YdcL;
1855 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUL = Y.SQUL;
1856 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDL = Y.SQDL;
1857 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUL = Y.SUL;
1858 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SDL = Y.SDL;
1859 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDL = Y.SUDL;
1860 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDcL = Y.SUDcL;
1861 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYucL = Y.SQUYucL;
1862 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQUL = Y.YuSQUL;
1863 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYdcL = Y.SQUYdcL;
1864 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQUL = Y.YdSQUL;
1865 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYucL = Y.SQDYucL;
1866 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQDL = Y.YuSQDL;
1867 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYdcL = Y.SQDYdcL;
1868 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQDL = Y.YdSQDL;
1869 (void)YlL; (void)Yl2L; (void)YuL; (void)YucL; (void)YdL; (void)YdcL;
1870 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
1871 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
1872 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
1873
1874 Cqd1_1111r_LNP = (Cqd1_00_LNP + Cqd1_0d_LNP*SDL(0,0) + Cqd1_d0_LNP*SQDL(0,0) + Cqd1_dd_LNP*SDL(0,0)*SQDL(0,0) + Cqd1_u0_LNP*SQUL(0,0) + Cqd1_ud_LNP*SDL(0,0)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqd1_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cqd1_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YdL(0,0) + Cqd1_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YdL(0,0) + Cqd1_y_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YdL(0,0) + Cqd1_yu_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YdSQUL(0,0)).real();
1875 Cqd1_1112r_LNP = (Cqd1_0d_LNP*SDL(0,1) + Cqd1_dd_LNP*SDL(0,1)*SQDL(0,0) + Cqd1_ud_LNP*SDL(0,1)*SQUL(0,0) + Cqd1_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YdcL(0,1) + Cqd1_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,1)*YdL(0,0) + Cqd1_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,1)*YdL(0,0) + Cqd1_y_LNP*YdcL(0,1)*YdL(0,0) + Cqd1_yu_LNP*YdcL(0,1)*YdSQUL(0,0)).real();

2018 Cqd8_2322r_LNP = (Cqd8_d0_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_dd_LNP*SDL(1,1)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_u0_LNP*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_ud_LNP*SDL(1,1)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2)*YdcL(1,1) + Cqd8_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,1)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,1)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_y_LNP*YdcL(1,1)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_yu_LNP*YdcL(1,1)*YdSQUL(1,2)).real();
2019 Cqd8_2322i_LNP = (Cqd8_d0_LNP*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_dd_LNP*SDL(1,1)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_u0_LNP*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_ud_LNP*SDL(1,1)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2)*YdcL(1,1) + Cqd8_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,1)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,1)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_y_LNP*YdcL(1,1)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_yu_LNP*YdcL(1,1)*YdSQUL(1,2)).imag();
2020 Cqd8_2323r_LNP = (Cqd8_dd_LNP*SDL(1,2)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_ud_LNP*SDL(1,2)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2)*YdcL(1,2) + Cqd8_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,2)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_y_LNP*YdcL(1,2)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_yu_LNP*YdcL(1,2)*YdSQUL(1,2)).real();
2021 Cqd8_2323i_LNP = (Cqd8_dd_LNP*SDL(1,2)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_ud_LNP*SDL(1,2)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2)*YdcL(1,2) + Cqd8_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,2)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,2)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_y_LNP*YdcL(1,2)*YdL(1,2) + Cqd8_yu_LNP*YdcL(1,2)*YdSQUL(1,2)).imag();
2022 Cqd8_2331r_LNP = (Cqd8_dd_LNP*SDL(2,0)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_ud_LNP*SDL(2,0)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(2,2)*YdcL(1,0) + Cqd8_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0)*YdL(2,2) + Cqd8_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0)*YdL(2,2) + Cqd8_y_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YdL(2,2) + Cqd8_yu_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YdSQUL(2,2)).real();
2023 Cqd8_2331i_LNP = (Cqd8_dd_LNP*SDL(2,0)*SQDL(1,2) + Cqd8_ud_LNP*SDL(2,0)*SQUL(1,2) + Cqd8_yd_LNP*SQDYdcL(2,2)*YdcL(1,0) + Cqd8_dy_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0)*YdL(2,2) + Cqd8_uy_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0)*YdL(2,2) + Cqd8_y_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YdL(2,2) + Cqd8_yu_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YdSQUL(2,2)).imag();

2038}
2039
2040// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2041// Helper: setParams_semileptonic4f
2042// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2043void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_semileptonic4f(const YukawaMats& Y) {
2044 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
2045 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
2046 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
2047 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
2048 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;
2049 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdcL = Y.YdcL;
2050 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUL = Y.SQUL;
2051 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDL = Y.SQDL;
2052 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUL = Y.SUL;
2053 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SDL = Y.SDL;
2054 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDL = Y.SUDL;
2055 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDcL = Y.SUDcL;
2056 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYucL = Y.SQUYucL;
2057 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQUL = Y.YuSQUL;
2058 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYdcL = Y.SQUYdcL;
2059 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQUL = Y.YdSQUL;
2060 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYucL = Y.SQDYucL;
2061 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQDL = Y.YuSQDL;
2062 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYdcL = Y.SQDYdcL;
2063 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQDL = Y.YdSQDL;
2064 (void)YlL; (void)Yl2L; (void)YuL; (void)YucL; (void)YdL; (void)YdcL;
2065 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
2066 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
2067 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
2068
2069 Cledq_1111r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,0)*YlL(0)).real();
2070 Cledq_1111i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,0)*YlL(0)).imag();
2071 Cledq_1112r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,1)*YlL(0)).real();
2072 Cledq_1112i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,1)*YlL(0)).imag();
2073 Cledq_1113r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,2)*YlL(0)).real();
2074 Cledq_1113i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,2)*YlL(0)).imag();
2075 Cledq_1121r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,0)*YlL(0)).real();
2076 Cledq_1121i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,0)*YlL(0)).imag();
2077 Cledq_1122r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,1)*YlL(0)).real();
2078 Cledq_1122i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,1)*YlL(0)).imag();
2079 Cledq_1123r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,2)*YlL(0)).real();
2080 Cledq_1123i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,2)*YlL(0)).imag();
2081 Cledq_1131r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,0)*YlL(0)).real();
2082 Cledq_1131i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,0)*YlL(0)).imag();
2083 Cledq_1132r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,1)*YlL(0)).real();
2084 Cledq_1132i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,1)*YlL(0)).imag();
2085 Cledq_1133r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,2)*YlL(0)).real();
2086 Cledq_1133i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,2)*YlL(0)).imag();
2087 Cledq_2211r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,0)*YlL(1)).real();
2088 Cledq_2211i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,0)*YlL(1)).imag();
2089 Cledq_2212r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,1)*YlL(1)).real();
2090 Cledq_2212i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,1)*YlL(1)).imag();
2091 Cledq_2213r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,2)*YlL(1)).real();
2092 Cledq_2213i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,2)*YlL(1)).imag();
2093 Cledq_2221r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,0)*YlL(1)).real();
2094 Cledq_2221i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,0)*YlL(1)).imag();
2095 Cledq_2222r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,1)*YlL(1)).real();
2096 Cledq_2222i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,1)*YlL(1)).imag();
2097 Cledq_2223r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,2)*YlL(1)).real();
2098 Cledq_2223i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,2)*YlL(1)).imag();
2099 Cledq_2231r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,0)*YlL(1)).real();
2100 Cledq_2231i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,0)*YlL(1)).imag();
2101 Cledq_2232r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,1)*YlL(1)).real();
2102 Cledq_2232i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,1)*YlL(1)).imag();
2103 Cledq_2233r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,2)*YlL(1)).real();
2104 Cledq_2233i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,2)*YlL(1)).imag();
2105 Cledq_3311r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,0)*YlL(2)).real();
2106 Cledq_3311i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,0)*YlL(2)).imag();
2107 Cledq_3312r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,1)*YlL(2)).real();
2108 Cledq_3312i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,1)*YlL(2)).imag();
2109 Cledq_3313r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,2)*YlL(2)).real();
2110 Cledq_3313i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(0,2)*YlL(2)).imag();
2111 Cledq_3321r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,0)*YlL(2)).real();
2112 Cledq_3321i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,0)*YlL(2)).imag();
2113 Cledq_3322r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,1)*YlL(2)).real();
2114 Cledq_3322i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,1)*YlL(2)).imag();
2115 Cledq_3323r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,2)*YlL(2)).real();
2116 Cledq_3323i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(1,2)*YlL(2)).imag();
2117 Cledq_3331r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,0)*YlL(2)).real();
2118 Cledq_3331i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,0)*YlL(2)).imag();
2119 Cledq_3332r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,1)*YlL(2)).real();
2120 Cledq_3332i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,1)*YlL(2)).imag();
2121 Cledq_3333r_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,2)*YlL(2)).real();
2122 Cledq_3333i_LNP = (Cledq_00_LNP*YdL(2,2)*YlL(2)).imag();
2123
2124 Clequ1_1111r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(0,0)).real();
2125 Clequ1_1111i_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(0,0)).imag();
2126 Clequ1_1112r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(0,1)).real();
2127 Clequ1_1112i_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(0,1)).imag();
2128 Clequ1_1113r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(0,2)).real();
2129 Clequ1_1113i_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(0,2)).imag();
2130 Clequ1_1121r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(1,0)).real();
2131 Clequ1_1121i_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(1,0)).imag();
2132 Clequ1_1122r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(1,1)).real();
2133 Clequ1_1122i_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(1,1)).imag();
2134 Clequ1_1123r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(1,2)).real();

2136 Clequ1_1131r_LNP = (Clequ1_00_LNP*YlL(0)*YucL(2,0)).real();

2239void NPSMEFTd6MFV::setParams_Cquqd(const YukawaMats& Y) {
2240 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& YlL = Y.YlL;
2241 const gslpp::vector<gslpp::complex>& Yl2L = Y.Yl2L;
2242 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuL = Y.YuL;
2243 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YucL = Y.YucL;
2244 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdL = Y.YdL;
2245 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdcL = Y.YdcL;
2246 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUL = Y.SQUL;
2247 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDL = Y.SQDL;
2248 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUL = Y.SUL;
2249 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SDL = Y.SDL;
2250 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDL = Y.SUDL;
2251 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SUDcL = Y.SUDcL;
2252 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYucL = Y.SQUYucL;
2253 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YuSQUL = Y.YuSQUL;
2254 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQUYdcL = Y.SQUYdcL;
2255 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& YdSQUL = Y.YdSQUL;
2256 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYucL = Y.SQDYucL;

2258 const gslpp::matrix<gslpp::complex>& SQDYdcL = Y.SQDYdcL;

2261 (void)SQUL; (void)SQDL; (void)SUL; (void)SDL; (void)SUDL; (void)SUDcL;
2262 (void)SQUYucL; (void)YuSQUL; (void)SQUYdcL; (void)YdSQUL;
2263 (void)SQDYucL; (void)YuSQDL; (void)SQDYdcL; (void)YdSQDL;
2264
2265 Cquqd1_1111r_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0)).real();
2266 Cquqd1_1111i_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,0)).imag();
2267 Cquqd1_1112r_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,1) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,1) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,1)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,1)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(0,1)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,1) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,1) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,1)).real();
2268 Cquqd1_1112i_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,1) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,1) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,1)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,1)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(0,1)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,1)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,1)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,1) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,1) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,1)).imag();
2269 Cquqd1_1113r_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,2) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,2) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,2)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,2)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(0,2)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,2) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,2) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,2)).real();
2270 Cquqd1_1113i_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,2) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(0,2) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,2)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,2)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(0,2)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,2)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,2)*YdcL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,2) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,2) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(0,0)*YucL(0,2)).imag();
2271 Cquqd1_1121r_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0)).real();
2272 Cquqd1_1121i_LNP = (Cquqd1_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1_00_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_d0_LNP*SQDYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1p_u0_LNP*SQUYucL(0,0)*YdcL(1,0) + Cquqd1p_0d_LNP*SQDYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_0u_LNP*SQUYdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0) + Cquqd1p_00_LNP*YdcL(1,0)*YucL(0,0)).imag();

2594bool NPSMEFTd6MFV::PostUpdate() {
2595
2596 NPSMEFTd6General::GenerateSMInitialConditions();
2597
2598 setNPSMEFTd6GeneralParameters();
2599
2600 if (!NPSMEFTd6General::PostUpdate()) return (false);
2601
2602 return (true);
2603}
